calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-20-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-20-2007 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Boyd McSparran, Esq. for Plaintiff: Robert Golovich, also present.
Defendant: Steven Bentley, present in pro per.
Case settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Stipulation for Entry of Judgment or Dismissed with prejudice.
Plaintiff is entitled to restitution and possession of the property located at 1035 Bush St., #11, San Francisco.
Defendant can remain in possession until 5 P.M. Nov. 1, 2007, and to vacate with all co-occupants.
Defendant will withdrawn all pending admistrative complaints.
If Defendant complied, Plaintiff will filed a dismissal of this action.
If failed, Plaintiff is entitled to a Judgment for back rent and damages.
Each to bear own fees and costs and mutually released from all claims.
Parties understand and agreed to terms of the written stipulation, matter is deemed settled, trial vacated.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR THURSDAY, AUG-16-2007: KAVITA SHARMA, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF; LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEY TYLER MACMILLAN, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT STEVEN BENTLEY WHO IS ALSO PRESENT THIS DAY.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD; THE CASE DOES NOT SETTLE. TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

PRO TEM JUDGE NILS ROSENQUEST; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (218/206).
